name: Oven Ki Murghi- Chicken, Green Chilies and Onions - India
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper, or to taste
1 1/4 lbs (568 grams) chicken breast, no skin, no bone
salt and freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
1 medium onion, cut into half rings
1 inch piece fresh ginger root, cut into fine strips
2 fresh hot green chilies, with seeds, cut into fine strips
1/2 teaspoon black or yellow mustard seeds
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Put tomato puree in a bowl. Add 1 tablespoon water; mix. Add all remaining ingredients for sauce in listed order, mixing as you go. Spread out chicken pieces. Salt and pepper them generously on both sides. Place 3 tablespoons of oil in a non-stick frying pan and set over high heat. When hot, put cinnamon, cardamom pods, and cloves. Ten seconds later, put in chicken pieces in single layer and brown them lightly on both sides. Remove with a slotted spoon and place in an ovenproof dish in single layer. Add the remaining oil to the frying pan and let it heat. Put in mustard seeds. As soon as they pop, just take seconds, add garlic. Stir. As soon as it starts to brown, pour in the sauce. As soon as the sauce heats up and starts bubbling, pour it over and around the chicken without displacing the onion mixture. Place the ovenproof dish, uncovered, in the oven and bake for 25 minutes. Serve immediately.
